name: Toggl Track
tagline: Simple time tracking for freelancers and teams
description: Toggl Track is a simple, fast time tracking tool used by freelancers, consultants, and teams. Its one-click tracking, browser extension, and automatic idle detection make it the easiest way to stay on top of billable hours.
use_cases: You're a freelancer or consultant who bills by the hour and needs one-click tracking across projects with minimal friction
Your team tracks time across multiple clients and projects and needs reports to split billable vs non-billable hours for invoicing
You want automatic idle detection and calendar integration so you never forget to log time even when you switch tasks frequently
You work across desktop, browser, and mobile throughout the day and need a time tracker that syncs seamlessly across all three
